g.text: DRE 3D Framework -- D3 Domain Expert Agents
12 Agents . 5 Domain Categories . Auto-Fix with Human-in-Loop Review
Consumer Engagement : adiClub, CRM, Consumer Service, NPS
Marketing & Traffic : Clickstream, Affiliate, Paid Search, SEO
All agents share the same 4-step execution protocol.
Each agent owns its domain fix logic + pipeline knowledge.
consumer_engagement -> adiClub / CRM / Consumer Service / NPS
marketing_traffic -> Clickstream / Affiliate / Paid Search / SEO
[2] Step 1 -- Auto-Fix with Human Review Gate
as defined by Playbook Compiler JSON recipe)
Patch upstream job or transform logic
(e.g. add null guard, fix partition filter,
correct join key, fix SLA window)
[Validation FAIL -- fix did not fully resolve issue]
Return to D2 for deeper root-cause
so next D1 run uses corrected reference point)
